title: looshy winter mode
description: a chilly winter overlay for the looshy pack
body:
![a cartoony logo that says "looshy"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1599dd37811de1826646d12ef464dd60a59d45d9.png)
___
### the classic look of minecraft, but it's cold?

introducing... winter mode! it's the same pack but now everything has frozen over... 
___

### read me first!!

this is an **extension/overlay** and not a standalone pack!

please update to the latest pack release here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy/versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy/versions). this overlay will be updated if any affected textures are updated.
